name: Hellmann's Caesar
recipeIngredient: 1 head romaine lettuce, chopped into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together all dressing ingredients.
2. Cover and chill until ready to serve.
3. In a large bowl, toss together with lettuce, croutons, and bacon.
4. Garnish with additional fresh grated parmesan cheese and fresh ground pepper.
Notes: The dressing will keep for up to 1 week in the refrigerator. Makes 1 cup dressing.
